general.name: Jamf Connect Menu - SO5
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CED6B727-F127-402D-BD27-EAC4C4D101A7</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CED6B727-F127-402D-BD27-EAC4C4D101A7</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu - SO5</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>AC8B644D-B34B-4445-94F3-8BB1FE2E376A</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>AC8B644D-B34B-4445-94F3-8BB1FE2E376A</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.connect</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>HiddenMenuItems</key><array><string>about</string><string>actions</string><string>gethelp</string><string>home</string><string>preferences</string><string>resetpassword</string><string>shares</string><string>quit</string></array><key>Appearance</key><dict><key>ShowWelcomeWindow</key><false/></dict><key>CustomMenuItems</key><dict><key>connect</key><string>Okta Apps</string><key>getsoftware</key><string>Open Self Service</string></dict><key>IdPSettings</key><dict><key>OktaAuthServer</key><string>so5.okta.com</string><key>Provider</key><string>Okta</string></dict><key>PasswordPolicies</key><dict><key>NetworkCheck</key><integer>60</integer><key>SyncPasswordsMessage</key><string>Your local Mac and OKTA passwords do not match.</string><key>PasswordSyncBlockList</key><array><string>hbcaccnt0</string><string>accnt0</string><string>Jamfsa</string></array></dict><key>SignIn</key><dict><key>AutoAuthenticate</key><true/><key>AutoOpenAppAtLogin</key><true/><key>SignInLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/so5logo.png</string><key>WindowTitle</key><string>Enter Your 6 Digit Employee Number In The Username Field.</string></dict><key>UserHelp</key><dict><key>HelpType</key><string>URL</string><key>SoftwarePath</key><string>/Applications/Self Service.app</string></dict><key>WebBrowser</key><dict><key>BrowserSelection</key><string>Google Chrome</string><key>LaunchBrowser</key><true/></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: SO5 ABM - SO5 Enrolled Photo Studio Image Edit PreStage
